title: GitHubAppConfig
description: Configuration schema for GitHub App integration. NO secrets stored — all sensitive values are env-var references only.

app_id_env.description: Environment variable name for GitHub App ID. NOT the actual value.

private_key_env.description: Environment variable name for GitHub App private key or path. NOT the actual value.

installation_id_env.description: Environment variable name for installation ID. NOT the actual value.

allowed_repos.description: Explicit allowlist of repositories. Empty = no repos allowed.

enabled.description: Whether GitHub PR publishing is enabled.
